arts.ttl: England vs Albania: Three dropped for match squad
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has opted to leave out Morgan Gibbs-White, Jarell Quansah and Aaron Ramsdale for his opening game as England manager against Albania.

arts.ttl: Tuchel and Kane take aim at Euros campaign before England v Albania: football – live
arts.sum: Scathing assessment of Euros displays under Southgate Football Daily | Football Weekly Extra | And email Luke Morgan Rogers is pushing for a starting spot in attack when the Thomas Tuchel era begins with England’s World Cup qualifier against Albania tonight. Rogers, who can play in a variety of roles in attacking midfield, has been in fine form for Aston Villa this season and has done well in training this week. He has not started for England yet but could feature as the No 10 against Albania, with Jude Bellingham in a slightly deeper role with Declan Rice. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Report: England international open to Man United move, Red Devils ready £50m offer
arts.sum: Manchester United have realised that they need a new centre-back in the summer transfer window and they have already started working towards it. The Red Devils are expected to lose both Victor Lindelof and Jonny Evans after this season. Even though they already have the likes of Leny Yoro, Matthijs de Ligt, Lisandro Martinez.
